base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of power_pellet — a pickup_item from 1980 pac man. Large white dot — blinks on/off at ~4Hz. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Large white dot — blinks on/off at ~4Hz; 50 points + activates frightened-mode for all ghosts for ~6s (decreases with level); 4 per maze at corners
